state_shape.eclipse: number (개기일식까지 남은 보름; 0이면 피의 제사 완성)

rules: RULE-01: The game starts at scene 'start' with empty fragments/beats/logs and eclipse=ECLIPSE_TURNS (10). Each choice in input.choices is applied in order, up to MAX_STEPS.

RULE-02: A choice valid for the current scene increments turn, transitions to its target scene, and logs '선택:<choiceId>'. An invalid choice (not offered by the current scene) is logged '무시:<choiceId>' and changes nothing else (no turn increment, no time passes).
RULE-03: When the chosen option carries a fragment not yet held, append it to fragments and log '조각:<F>'. Fragments are unique (collecting an owned fragment is a no-op for the fragment list).

RULE-04: After a fragment is collected, re-evaluate beats. Beat AWAKENING fires exactly once when F1 is held (logs 'BEAT:AWAKENING'); beat RESONANCE fires exactly once when all five fragments (F1..F5) are held (logs 'BEAT:RESONANCE').
RULE-05: A choice with verdict=true (march) ends the confrontation: scene becomes end_dawn (ending NEW_DAWN) if all five fragments are held, otherwise end_ritual (ending RITUAL_COMPLETE).
RULE-06: Reaching any scene that declares an ending sets state.ending and isGameOver=true; remaining choices are not processed. end_fled yields ending FLED.

RULE-07: At the end of every turn that lands on a non-ending scene, eclipse decreases by 1; if it reaches 0 or below, the scene becomes end_ritual (RITUAL_COMPLETE). Turns that end the game (land on an ending scene) and ignored invalid choices do not decrement eclipse.

RULE-08 (THIS CARD): Checkpoint infiltration. Add an 'infiltrate' choice to scene 'start' -> new scene 'checkpoint', which offers 'attune' (-> 'hub', slips past surveillance) and 'bluff' (-> new ending scene 'end_caught', ending CAUGHT). All existing 'start' choices (enter, turn_back) and every other scene are kept intact, so any play that never chooses 'infiltrate' produces byte-for-byte identical output to base. This card edits scenes.js only (no engine/beats change).

files.description: Scene graph data (B layer). THIS card adds the 'infiltrate' choice to 'start', the new scene 'checkpoint' (attune->hub, bluff->end_caught), and the new ending scene 'end_caught' (CAUGHT). All existing scenes/choices kept byte-identical.
